channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie: No Bonus Share Recommendation
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd, in its adjourned meeting held on May 17, 2026, decided not to recommend the issue of bonus shares. This decision was made after analyzing the Consolidated Guidelines on Capital Restructuring of CPSEs issued by the Ministry of Finance on November 18, 2024.

  • Balmer Lawrie Board decided against recommending bonus shares.
  • Decision followed review of CPSE capital restructuring guidelines.
  • Meeting was held on May 17, 2026.
  • The meeting resumed at 11:30 a.m. and concluded at p.m.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Bonus

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie Recommends ₹4.25 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd's Board of Directors, in its meeting held on May 17, 2026, recommended a dividend of ₹4.25 per equity share of ₹10 each for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The dividend, if approved by shareholders at the Annual General Meeting, will be paid within 30 days of declaration.

  • Balmer Lawrie recommends ₹4.25 dividend per share.
  • Dividend is for the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Shareholders' approval is required at the AGM.
  • Payment will be made within 30 days of declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie Recommends ₹4.25 Dividend for FY26
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd's Board of Directors, at its meeting on May 17, 2026, recommended a dividend of ₹4.25 per equity share of ₹10 each for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The dividend, if approved by shareholders at the Annual General Meeting, will be paid within 30 days of declaration.

  • Balmer Lawrie recommends ₹4.25 dividend per share for FY26.
  • Dividend is subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Payment will be made within 30 days of declaration at AGM.
  • The recommendation was made at the Board Meeting on May 17, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Dividend

item.title: [RELINFRA] Reliance Infra Board Meeting on May 23, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
Reliance Infrastructure Ltd has scheduled a Board meeting on May 23, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and approve raising long term resources by issue of equity shares or other securities.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 23, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of raising long term resources via equity or other securities.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026 until 48 hours after the board meeting outcome.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RPOWER] Reliance Power Board Meeting on 21 May 2026
item.description:
Reliance Power Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and approve raising long-term resources through the issuance of equity shares or other securities via preferential issue, qualified institutional placement, foreign currency convertible bonds, or Non-Convertible Debentures.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of raising long-term resources via equity or debt instruments.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the board meeting outcome.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE POWER LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie Decides Against Share Buyback
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd, in its adjourned meeting held on May 17, 2026, has decided not to proceed with the buyback of the company's shares. This decision was made after analyzing the Consolidated Guidelines on Capital Restructuring of CPSEs issued by the Ministry of Finance on November 18, 2024.

  • Balmer Lawrie board decided against a share buyback.
  • Decision followed review of capital restructuring guidelines.
  • Meeting was held on May 17, 2026.
  • Previous intimations regarding buyback were dated May 5 & 15, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Buyback

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie: No Equity Share Split Recommended
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd, in its adjourned meeting held on May 17, 2026, decided not to recommend the splitting of the company's equity share capital. This decision was made after analyzing the Consolidated Guidelines on Capital Restructuring of CPSEs issued by the Ministry of Finance, Department of Investment and Public Asset Management.

  • Balmer Lawrie's board decided against recommending an equity share split.
  • Decision follows analysis of guidelines on capital restructuring of CPSEs.
  • Meeting was held on May 17, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [GALAGEX] Galaxy Agrico Exports: Monitoring Agency Report for Rights Issue
item.description:
Galaxy Agrico Exports Ltd submitted the Monitoring Agency Report by Acuité Ratings & Research Limited for its Rights Issue for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The report indicates no deviation from the objects of the issue. The Rights Issue ran from February 02, 2026, to March 02, 2026. The report states that it provides an objective view of the utilization of issue proceeds based on information provided by the Issuer.

  • Galaxy Agrico Exports submits Monitoring Agency Report for Rights Issue.
  • Acuité Ratings & Research is the Monitoring Agency.
  • No deviation observed from the objects of the Rights Issue.
  • Rights Issue period: February 02, 2026, to March 02, 2026.
  • Issue size was INR 48.99 Crs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GALAXY AGRICO EXPORTS LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie FY26: Revenue from Operations at ₹2,69,927.45 Lakhs
item.description:
Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd's board meeting on May 17, 2026, approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The company reported revenue from operations of ₹2,69,927.45 lakhs and a profit for the period of ₹24,567.69 lakhs. The results were reviewed by the Audit Committee before board approval.

  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26 approved.
  • Revenue from operations for FY26 stood at ₹2,69,927.45 lakhs.
  • Profit for the period from continuing operations is ₹24,567.69 lakhs.
  • The Audit Committee reviewed the results on May 17, 2026.
  • Board of Directors approved the results on May 17, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [BALMLAWRIE] Balmer Lawrie FY26: Revenue from Operations at ₹2,69,927.45 Lakhs
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Balmer Lawrie & Company Ltd announced audited financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results after review and recommendation by the Audit Committee. Revenue from Operations for the year stood at ₹2,69,927.45 Lakhs, compared to ₹2,49,448.71 Lakhs in the previous year. Profit for the period reached ₹24,567.69 Lakhs, up from ₹23,279.91 Lakhs year-over-year.

  • Revenue from Operations for FY26 reached ₹2,69,927.45 Lakhs.
  • Total Income for FY26 stood at ₹2,78,459.58 Lakhs.
  • Profit for the period from continuing operations is ₹24,567.69 Lakhs.
  • Basic and diluted earnings per share are reported for continuing operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALMER LAWRIE & CO.LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result
